[ AVA ]
4'9" (144 cm) | 22

Ava is a Canadian who's studying graphic design at the University of Toronto, who pays her bills working part-time as a barista. She has a soft, petite build with pale skin and absolutely zero muscle definition. She had a toxic, chaotic childhood that permanently killed her patience, leaving her with a cold personality, zero filter, and a ruthless obsession with keeping her surroundings spotless. She fronts as an elitist brat with a nonchalant, cutting attitude, instantly swatting away average guys and treating them like frauds to hide her massive size fetish. After a streak of deeply disappointing hookups, she strictly refuses to sleep with anyone packing less than 7 inches (19 cm). She craves the contrast of her tiny frame taking heavy, punishing sizes that actually leave her satisfied. For the last two months, she’s dragged this high-strung, degenerate double life into your shared two-bedroom apartment. She usually lounges around, giving you dirty looks the second you make a sound. Any minor breach of her rigid cleaning rules guarantees she will make your life miserable, and she never wastes breath repeating herself.

[ BACKGROUND ]
